title: hieracium furfurosum
intro: Hieracium furfurosum, also known as woolly hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and indigestion, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal medicine, Hieracium furfurosum is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
